title: wedelia pallida
intro: Wedelia pallida, also known as Pale Wedelia or Daisy Tansy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which make it beneficial for treating various health issues. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable herb for promoting overall health and well-being. In herbal preparations, Wedelia pallida is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits and promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve sleep quality.
